description: Dashboard completo para monitorização Cantolico - Logs, Performance, User Activity, Security, Content, Playlists, Email, System

panels.description: Total log lines in selected range
panels.title: Total Logs

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" | level="error" [$__interval]))

sum(count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" | level="warn" [$__interval]))

sum(count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" | level="security" [$__interval]))

sum by (level) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" [$__interval]))

sum by (level) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" [$__interval]))

sum by (category) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" [$__interval]))

sum by (category) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" |= "$user_id" |= "$song_id" |= "$playlist_id" |= "$submission_id" |~ "(?i)$search" [$__interval]))
quantile_over_time(0.50, {app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | category=~"api|http" | unwrap response_time_ms [$__interval]) by ()
quantile_over_time(0.95, {app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | category=~"api|http" | unwrap response_time_ms [$__interval]) by ()
quantile_over_time(0.99, {app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | category=~"api|http" | unwrap response_time_ms [$__interval]) by ()
topk(10, sum by (message) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | category=~"api|http" | response_time_ms > 500 [$__interval])))
topk(20, sum by (user_email) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level=~"$level" | category=~"$category" | user_email!="" [$__interval])))

panels.description: Approximate distinct active users in last 5 minutes
panels.title: Active Users (5min)

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (song_id) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | category="song" |~ "(?i)view" | song_id!="" [$__interval])))
topk(20, sum by (ip_address) (count_over_time({app="cantolico"} | json | environment=~"$environment" | level="security" | ip_address!="" [$__interval])))

list.description: Free text search across all log messages
list.label: Search
list.name: search

title: Cantolico - Centro de Controlo
